---
title: "MarchMadness Through 2026"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## 

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
```

```{r}
files <- list.files("March Madness Regular Season Data Through 2026", pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)


regular_season_df <- files |>
  lapply(function(f) read_csv(f, col_types = cols(.default = "c"))) |>
  bind_rows()
```

```{r}
getwd()
list.files()
list.files("March Madness Regular Season Data")
```

```{}
```
